reasonCodes.description: Resolved the bounded Phase 1 receipt-envelope and monotone promise object family.
Urgent diversion is required, but the durable urgent settlement remains pending rather than issued.
Urgent diversion guidance has been issued durably and the request may move to urgent_diverted.
Routine outcome grammar settled on the calm receipt path.
Routine outcome grammar settled with residual-risk review preserved explicitly.
The draft could not be submitted authoritatively and must resume from bounded stale recovery.
Processing or runtime failure forced the request into explicit failed-safe recovery grammar.
Submit readiness blocked the request and the outcome grammar must remain denied_scope rather than calm receipt.
Outcome presentation is published only through ArtifactPresentationContract-bound artifacts.
External browser or cross-app outcome handoff remains governed by OutboundNavigationGrant.
